# GitHub repository SEO (maintainer notes)

Update topics and description when positioning changes:

```sh
gh repo edit Taibur-Rahaman/Agent2Wp \
  --description "WordPress MCP plugin — connect Claude, Cursor & AI agents to WordPress. PHP, WP-CLI, files, posts, Elementor skills. Free Expert Suite." \
  --homepage "https://github.com/Taibur-Rahaman/Agent2Wp/releases/latest"
```

Recommended topics: `wordpress`, `wordpress-plugin`, `mcp`, `model-context-protocol`, `ai-agents`, `cursor`, `claude`, `wp-cli`, `elementor`, `gutenberg`, `woocommerce`, `wordpress-automation`, `ai-wordpress`, `php`, `artificial-intelligence`, `automation`, `open-source`.
